title: Post-M8 UI remediation release-readiness verdict update
summary: Update release-readiness evidence after UI/playability remediation while preserving public release, Web and Windows owner gates.
acceptance: Records which owner UI/playability blockers are resolved, partially resolved or still blocking release readiness
Updates UI, playability, i18n and responsive verdicts without changing Web demo-only or Windows controlled-test verdicts
Keeps public release, EA, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services and public save compatibility owner-gated
Includes remaining art production needs and whether a release-candidate audit can proceed
Does not create or execute public release tasks
forbiddenPaths: telemetry, accounts, hosted feedback or paid services
changing Web demo-only or Windows controlled-test verdicts without owner approval
